calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Evon Sahaleh

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:56:19 a.m., pausing at 10:19:50 a.m., resuming at 10:33:43 am and concluding at 10:35:39 a.m. (D505)

Rachel Crockett, Esq. representing Plaintiff Bitdeliver S.R.L. via Zoom Video Conference.
Max Hartman, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Evon Sahaleh not appearing.

Complaint filed May 16, 2023.
Proof of personal service filed july 1, 2023.
Default entered on Sept. 15,2023

Counsel to provide a summary for the request for judgment.
The Court examines Max Hartman, witness for Plaintiff.
Counsel provides offer of proof to the request for judgment.
The calculation of the interest is discussed.

Witness confirms that statements and declarations made are true and correct and is the best of his professional knowledge.

After reviewing the declarations, hearing the testimony and statements, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff.
The plaintiff shall recover from the defendant the following:
Damages $124,500.00
Pre-judgment interest $21,835.62
Attorney's Fees $7,325.00
Costs $585.88

Total Judgment $154,246.50

Plaintiff to submit an amended proposed judgment for review and signature of the court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-31-2025 Continued To Mar-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2024 Continued To Mar-25-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Continued To Feb-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:29 am and concluding at 9:40 am.

Plaintiff Bitdeliver SRL is represented by Rachel Crockett, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant Evon Sahaleh not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

MAX HARTMAN is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

The Court requires additional information and evidence regarding this matter.

Good cause appearing, the Court continues this matter to allow Plaintiff to file suplemental declarations and supporting evidence. This matter continued to February 14, 2025 at 9:00 am in Dept 505. (D505)
